title: Hospital Inpatient Management System Review: InpatientCare vs WardManager Deep Comparison | 2026 Review
description: Professional review of hospital inpatient management systems, comparing bed management, patient tracking, medical order execution and other core functions. Selection guide for hospital inpatient digitalization. Learn more about features and pricing!
content:
Inpatient Management System Importance Background

Inpatient management is a core hospital business process, inpatient management systems directly affect inpatient clinical quality, bed utilization efficiency, and nursing service quality. Modern inpatient management systems need to integrate bed management, patient condition tracking, medical order execution, nursing records, discharge follow-up and other functions. Excellent inpatient management systems improve inpatient clinical efficiency, reduce medical errors, and improve patient hospitalization experience. This article will deeply review InpatientCare and WardManager, two major inpatient management solutions.

Inpatient Management Core Features Comparison

Feature DimensionInpatientCareWardManagerImportance Level
Bed Real-time ManagementComprehensiveComprehensiveCore
Patient Admission ManagementComprehensiveComprehensiveCore
Condition Progress TrackingComprehensiveBasicCore
Medical Order Execution ManagementComprehensiveComprehensiveCore
Nursing Record ManagementComprehensiveBasicCore
Discharge Assessment ManagementComprehensiveComprehensiveImportant
Follow-up Plan ManagementComprehensiveNot SupportedImportant
Inpatient Fee ManagementComprehensiveComprehensiveImportant
Inpatient Statistics AnalysisComprehensiveBasicImportant
Nursing Scheduling ManagementComprehensiveBasicImportant

InpatientCare System Details

Bed Real-time Management Function

InpatientCare bed management system provides bed real-time monitoring function, displaying bed occupancy status, bed type, bed location and other information. The system supports intelligent bed allocation, optimizing bed configuration based on patient condition, department characteristics, bed utilization rate and other factors. Bed transfer and adjustment function is comprehensive, ensuring efficient bed utilization.

  • Bed real-time monitoring display status
  • Intelligent bed allocation optimization
  • Comprehensive bed transfer adjustment function
  • Bed utilization rate statistics analysis
  • Bed reservation mechanism support
  • Bed cleaning disinfection record

Condition Progress Tracking Function

InpatientCare condition tracking system supports patient during-hospitalization condition real-time recording and trend analysis. Physicians can record daily ward round situations, condition changes, treatment adjustments and other information, system automatically generates condition progress timeline. Nursing records and physician records are synchronously linked, ensuring complete clinical information.

  • Daily condition real-time recording
  • Condition change trend analysis
  • Complete treatment adjustment recording
  • Condition progress timeline generation
  • Nursing record synchronous linkage
  • Condition warning reminder function

Medical Order Execution Management Function

InpatientCare medical order management system supports physician issuing orders, nurse executing orders full workflow recording. The system automatically transfers orders to nurse workstation, nurses confirm record after executing orders. Order execution time, execution personnel, execution results are completely recorded, ensuring order execution traceability.

  • Comprehensive physician order issuing workflow
  • Orders automatically transferred to nurse station
  • Nurse execution confirmation recording
  • Accurate order execution time recording
  • Complete execution results traceability
  • Order execution reminder function

Nursing Record Management Function

InpatientCare nursing record system supports nursing assessment, nursing plan, nursing execution recording and other complete nursing management workflows. Nursing records comply with nursing standard requirements, supporting nursing quality assessment and nursing statistics analysis. The system provides nursing reminder function, ensuring timely completion of nursing tasks.

  • Comprehensive nursing assessment recording
  • Nursing plan automatic generation
  • Complete nursing execution recording
  • Comply with nursing standard requirements
  • Nursing quality assessment analysis
  • Nursing task reminder function

WardManager System Details

Bed Real-time Management Function

WardManager bed management system provides basic bed management function, displaying bed occupancy status. The system supports manual bed allocation, administrators can manually arrange beds based on patient situation. Bed utilization rate statistics function is basic, suitable for medical institutions with simple bed management requirements.

  • Bed status real-time display
  • Manual bed allocation function
  • Basic bed utilization rate statistics
  • Bed adjustment function support
  • Suitable for simple bed management needs
  • Lack of intelligent bed allocation

Condition Progress Tracking Function

WardManager condition tracking function is basic, supporting patient hospitalization information recording and simple condition recording. The system lacks condition trend analysis and timeline display functions. Suitable for simple condition tracking requirement scenarios.

  • Basic patient hospitalization information recording
  • Simple condition recording function
  • Lack of condition trend analysis
  • No timeline display function
  • Suitable for simple condition tracking needs
  • Limited condition warning function

Medical Order Execution Management Function

WardManager medical order management system provides basic order workflow, supporting physician issuing orders and nurse execution recording. System order transfer function is basic, order execution recording completeness is limited. Suitable for basic order management requirement scenarios.

  • Basic order issuing workflow
  • Basic order transfer function
  • Nurse execution recording support
  • Limited order execution recording completeness
  • Suitable for basic order management needs
  • Basic order execution reminder function

Nursing Record Management Function

WardManager nursing record function is basic, supporting simple nursing recording and nursing task management. The system lacks nursing assessment, nursing plan, nursing quality assessment and other advanced functions. Suitable for medical institutions with simple nursing recording requirements.

  • Basic nursing record function
  • Simple nursing task management
  • Lack of nursing assessment function
  • No nursing plan automatic generation
  • Limited nursing quality assessment function
  • Suitable for simple nursing recording needs

System Integration Capability Comparison

Integration Capability DimensionInpatientCareWardManager
EMR System IntegrationDeep IntegrationBasic Interface
Doctor Workstation IntegrationDeep IntegrationComplete Interface
Nursing Workstation IntegrationDeep IntegrationBasic Interface
Medical Billing System IntegrationComplete InterfaceComplete Interface
Pharmacy Management System IntegrationComplete InterfaceBasic Interface
Medical Insurance System InterfaceComplete InterfaceComplete Interface

User Reviews and Market Feedback

InpatientCare User Reviews

Large hospitals generally have positive reviews of InpatientCare, praising its comprehensive functions and clear workflows. A nursing department director at a tertiary hospital stated: InpatientCare helped us achieve complete digitalization of inpatient nursing workflow, nursing quality significantly improved. However, some users reported system has many functions, initial training takes time.

WardManager User Reviews

Small-medium medical institutions have positive reviews of WardManager, finding it quick to deploy and easy to use. An inpatient department head nurse at a community hospital commented: WardManager is simple and easy to use, quick to adopt, met our basic inpatient management needs.

Price Plan Comparison Analysis

Price Plan DimensionInpatientCareWardManager
Standard Monthly Fee$500$300
Professional Monthly Fee$750$450
Enterprise Monthly Fee$1000$600
Implementation Fee$4000 One-time$2000 One-time
Training FeeIncluded in ImplementationPer Person Pricing
Annual Maintenance Fee15% Software Fee10% Software Fee

Selection Recommendations and Recommended Scenarios

Scenarios Suitable for InpatientCare

  • Large comprehensive hospital inpatient department
  • Medical institutions with high nursing quality requirements
  • Need condition trend analysis function
  • Pursuing complete inpatient workflow digitalization
  • Sufficient budget accepting complex systems
  • Professional IT team support

Scenarios Suitable for WardManager

  • Small-medium medical institution inpatient department
  • Basic inpatient management needs sufficient
  • Limited budget pursuing cost-effectiveness
  • Need quick deployment of simple systems
  • Limited IT team capabilities
  • Medical institutions with smaller inpatient volume

Summary and Final Recommendation

Inpatient management system selection should consider hospital size, inpatient volume, nursing quality requirements and budget. InpatientCare is suitable for large hospitals pursuing comprehensive functions and high-quality nursing, WardManager is suitable for small-medium institutions quickly deploying basic solutions. We recommend hospitals conduct detailed inpatient workflow analysis before selection, clarify functional needs, and choose the inpatient management system that best matches their needs.
author: Hospital IT Expert
